title: Tools, Device Commands, PBQs, and Certification Capstone · Network Stakeholder Mission
summary: A growing organization connecting a branch, cloud services, and remote operators. The organization needs a complete design, implementation plan, security model, monitoring package, and repaired failure scenario. Planned artifact: Deliver N10-009 Branch Network Capstone with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend a complete design, implementation, operations, security, recovery, and troubleshooting result against N10-009 objectives.
Solve performance-based configuration and troubleshooting tasks by preserving requirements, recording state, and verifying all paths.
Interpret MAC table, route, interface, configuration, ARP, VLAN, and power command outputs without assuming vendor syntax.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
